2605.05689.title: GCCM: Enhancing Generative Graph Prediction via Contrastive Consistency Model
2605.05689.paper_summary: Conditional generative models, particularly diffusion-based methods, have recently been applied to graph prediction by modeling the target as a conditional distribution given the input graph, yielding competitive results compared to deterministic predictor. However, existing diffusion-based prediction methods typically require expensive iterative denoising at inference and often suffer from unstable sampling, which motivates recent efforts to reduce inference denoising steps and enable stable sampling via techniques such as consistency training. Despite this progress, we find that existing consistency training methods for graph prediction could potentially fall into a shortcut solution: the model may attempt to satisfy the self-consistency constraint by ignoring the noisy target (i.e., assigning it negligible weight), ultimately collapsing into a purely deterministic predictor. To mitigate such shortcut solution, we propose GCCM, a graph contrastive consistency model that goes beyond isolated pairwise matching between the same target at different noise levels by introducing negative pairs into a contrastive consistency objective. This adds an additional separation requirement, making the shortcut solution no longer trivially sufficient to satisfy the proposed objective. Moreover, we apply feature perturbation to the input node/edge features to break identical conditioning on the input graph, so that the shortcut no longer yields the same predictions across noise levels and becomes less attractive. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that GCCM mitigates the shortcut solution and yields consistent performance improvements in graph prediction compared to deterministic predictors.
2605.05689.paper_summary_zh: 條件生成模型，特別是基於擴散的方法，最近已被應用於圖形預測，通過將目標建模為給定輸入圖形的條件分佈，產生了與確定性預測器相比具有競爭力的結果。<lb/>然而，現有的基於擴散的預測方法通常在推斷時需要昂貴的迭代去噪，並且經常遭受不穩定的取樣，這促使最近的努力減少推斷去噪步驟並通過一致性訓練等技術實現穩定取樣。<lb/>儘管有這些進展，我們發現現有的圖形預測一致性訓練方法可能會陷入捷徑解決方案：模型可能試圖通過忽略噪聲目標（即，給予其微不足道的權重）來滿足自我一致性約束，最終崩潰為純粹的確定性預測器。<lb/>為了減輕這種捷徑解決方案，我們提出了GCCM，一種圖形對比一致性模型，它通過將負對進入對比一致性目標，超越了在不同噪聲水平下對同一目標的孤立成對匹配。<lb/>這增加了一個額外的分離要求，使得捷徑解決方案不再輕易滿足所提出的目標。<lb/>此外，我們對輸入節點/邊特徵應用特徵擾動，以打破對輸入圖形的相同條件，這樣捷徑不再在不同噪聲水平下產生相同的預測，變得不那麼有吸引力。<lb/>在基準數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，GCCM減輕了捷徑解決方案，並在圖形預測中相比確定性預測器產生了一致的性能提升。
2605.05689.author: Shaozhen Ma et.al.
2605.05689.authors: Shaozhen Ma, Wei Huang, Hanchen Wang, Dong Wen, Wenjie Zhang
